Before OpenClaw 2026.4.2, `POST /sessions/:sessionKey/kill` did not enforce write scopes in identity-bearing HTTP modes. A caller limited to read-only operator scopes could still terminate a running subagent session.

## Impact

A read-scoped caller could perform a write-class control-plane mutation and interrupt delegated work. This was an authorization bug on the HTTP scope boundary, not a shared-secret compatibility exception.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.4.1`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.2`
- Latest published npm version: `2026.4.1`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `54a0878517167c6e49900498cf77420dadb74beb` — enforce session-kill HTTP scopes

## Release Process Note

The fix is present on `main` and is staged for OpenClaw `2026.4.2`. Publish this advisory after the `2026.4.2` npm release is live.

Thanks @EaEa0001 for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00187, "percentile": 0.08471}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5hff-46vh-rxmw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hff-46vh-rxmw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5hff-46vh-rxmw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41298"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-21T00:16:30Z", "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-5hff-46vh-rxmw", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/54a0878517167c6e49900498cf77420dadb74beb", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41298", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-authorization-bypass-in-session-termination-endpoint", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hff-46vh-rxmw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-5hff-46vh-rxmw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Read-scoped identity-bearing HTTP clients could kill sessions via /sessions/:sessionKey/kill", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T21:04:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hff-46vh-rxmw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Read-scoped identity-bearing HTTP clients could kill sessions via /sessions/:sessionKey/kill
